Rejected. The cap missed more than the configured audit threshold.

experiment_findings.finding: Clean. The six-hour full-scope run passed source-pressure thresholds; its marginal yield was 9.986 inserts/page with 49.9% duplicate skips.
Source-clean but not GitHub-clean. The run passed source-pressure checks, but at least one matching job failed after ingestion.
Pending. No matching run has been recorded in the ledger yet.
Seed clean. Treatment is pending, and no tracked full-scope run has contaminated the pair yet.
Source-pressure clean, but rejected by the paired audit or strategy-specific decision rule.

planned_experiments.description: Completed full-scope six-hour calibration run. Kept as control evidence; do not repeat as the default strategy-test pattern.
planned_experiments.success_criteria: 202/202 jobs success, HTTP 429 rate below 0.5%, fetch error rate below 1%, no abnormal runtime growth.

planned_experiments.description: Completed full-scope three-hour calibration run. Source ingestion was clean, but the workflow ended with a post-ingestion GitHub artifact failure. Kept as control evidence; do not repeat as the default strategy-test pattern.
planned_experiments.success_criteria: Source-pressure metrics clean enough to inform grouped frequency-test design.

planned_experiments.description: Randomized 25-app group uncapped incremental treatment run six hours after a clean same-group seed/control pass.
planned_experiments.success_criteria: Clean source-pressure metrics, no abnormal runtime growth, and enough marginal inserted rows per page to justify a six-hour grouped refresh.

planned_experiments.description: Seed/control run completed for randomized 25-app group. Treatment run should execute three hours after the seed to measure marginal inserts.
planned_experiments.success_criteria: Clean source-pressure metrics, no abnormal runtime growth, and enough marginal inserted rows per page to justify a three-hour grouped refresh.

planned_experiments.description: Completed randomized 25-app group capped at one page per app, followed by an uncapped audit on the same group. Rejected because the audit found missed inserts beyond the threshold.
planned_experiments.success_criteria: Audit inserts after the capped pass are no more than 5% of total capped-plus-audit inserts, with clean source-pressure metrics.

planned_experiments.description: Completed cap=3 randomized 25-app test. Rejected: audit inserted 25 additional Spotify reviews, an 11.7% missed-insert rate.
planned_experiments.success_criteria: Audit inserts after the capped pass are no more than 5% of total capped-plus-audit inserts, with clean source-pressure metrics.

recommendation.current_recommendation: Keep the twice-daily full-scope incremental schedule as the production baseline while remaining controlled tests are completed.
why: Recent successful full-scope runs show clean source-pressure metrics.
There are enough successful baseline observations to compare against experiments.
High-activity apps account for 72.0% of recent inserts and 52.7% of recent pages.

runs.label: manual full-scope validation
runs.notes: Early full-scope manual validation after switching daily incremental to matrix mode.

runs.label: manual fallback after delayed schedule
runs.notes: Manual coverage run after the expected evening schedule did not appear on time.

runs.label: late scheduled full-scope baseline

long_tail_apps.app_name: All in Hole: Black Hole Games

runs.notes: GitHub emitted the missed evening schedule late, shortly after the manual fallback.

runs.label: scheduled run with one failed app job
runs.notes: Kept in ledger as a failure observation. Do not include in clean baseline recommendation.

runs.label: scheduled full-scope baseline
runs.notes: Most recent successful scheduled baseline at ledger creation.

runs.label: F1 six-hour full-scope experiment
runs.notes: Manual F1 run launched more than six hours after the previous clean full-scope run. It completed 202/202 jobs successfully with 283 pages, 5,640 fetched rows, 2,826 inserted reviews, 3 updated reviews, 2,811 skipped duplicates, 0 HTTP 429s, 1 HTTP 404, 11 retried pages, 1 fetch error tied to the 404, and 0 capped scopes.

runs.label: F2 three-hour full-scope experiment

long_tail_apps.app_name: All in Hole: Black Hole Games

runs.notes: Manual F2 run launched more than three hours after F1. Source ingestion was clean across all 200 apps: 203 pages, 4,060 fetched rows, 136 inserted reviews, 0 updated reviews, 3,924 skipped duplicates, 0 HTTP 429s, 0 non-200 responses, 14 retried pages, 0 fetch errors, and 0 capped scopes. GitHub marked the run failed because daily 58 Telegram Messenger completed ingestion successfully but actions/upload-artifact failed during FinalizeArtifact with ETIMEDOUT.

runs.label: abandoned full-scope D1 attempt
runs.notes: Cancelled after the experiment design was corrected from full-scope 200-app strategy tests to randomized 25-app groups. Postgres saw only 16 pages across 16 apps, 320 fetched rows, 0 HTTP 429s, and 0 non-200 responses. This run is excluded from D1 evidence.

runs.label: D1 one-page grouped cap deadlock observation
runs.notes: Invalid D1 attempt before matrix Postgres init fix. Source fetch was clean, but workflow failed from a Postgres sync-state deadlock; excluded from D1 cap decision evidence.

runs.label: D1 one-page grouped uncapped audit
runs.notes: Uncapped audit after D1 one-page cap for om_group_01: 26 pages, 520 rows, 12 inserts, 0 HTTP 429, 0 non-200; only Vinted needed page 2.

runs.label: D1 one-page grouped cap
runs.notes: Post-deadlock-fix grouped one-page cap run for om_group_01: 25 pages, 500 rows, 0 inserts, 0 HTTP 429, 0 non-200.

runs.label: D2 three-page grouped uncapped audit
runs.notes: Uncapped audit after D2 three-page cap for om_group_02: 32 pages, 640 rows, 25 inserts, 0 HTTP 429, 0 non-200; Spotify needed page 5 and accounted for all 25 audit inserts, Duolingo needed page 4.

runs.label: D2 three-page grouped cap
runs.notes: Grouped three-page cap run for om_group_02: 29 pages, 580 rows, 188 inserts, 0 HTTP 429, 0 non-200; Spotify and Duolingo hit page cap.

runs.label: FG2 three-hour grouped seed/control
runs.notes: FG2 seed/control for om_group_04 before the three-hour treatment: 27 pages, 540 rows, 107 inserts, 0 HTTP 429, 0 non-200, 0 retries.
